# gcore_cloud_inference_registry_credential (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_cloud_inference_registry_credential" "example_cloud_inference_registry_credential" {
  project_id = 1
  credential_name = "docker-io"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `credential_name` (String) Registry credential name.

### Optional

- `project_id` (Number) Project ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Registry credential name.
- `name` (String) Registry credential name.
- `registry_url` (String) Registry URL.
- `username` (String) Registry username.
